sections.title: When using the right-click repair option

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: There, I have repaired your pouches. Now leave me alone. I'm concentrating!

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: You don't seem to have any pouches in need of repair. Leave me alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Quiet! You must not break my concentration!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Well, if my concentration is broken while keeping this rift open, the results won't be pretty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In what way?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: If we are lucky, the heads of anyone within the Abyss will suddenly explode, including us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... And if we're unlucky?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: If we are unlucky, then the entire universe will begin to fold in upon itself, and all reality as we know it will be annihilated in a single stroke.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: So leave me alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Do you mean what am I doing here in the Abyss? Or are you asking me what I consider my ultimate role to be in this voyage that we call life?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... The first one.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: By remaining here and holding this rift open, I am providing a permanent link between normal space and this strange dimension.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: As long as my spell remains in effect, we have the capability to teleport into the Abyss.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Now leave me be! I can afford no distraction in my task!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need your help with something.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: What? Oh... very well. What did you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another Abyssal book?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Don't waste my time if you don't have enough free space to take it.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Here, take it. It is important to pool our research.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have a new essence pouch?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Don't waste my time if you don't have enough free space to take it.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Here. Be more careful with your belongings in future.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: You already have a Colossal Pouch. Are you aware of the dimensional turmoil you can cause by using too many pouches at the same time?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Now stop wasting my time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you repair my pouches?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Fine. A simple transfiguration spell should resolve things for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Now can you leave me alone? I can't keep affording these distractions!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't need anything right now.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Then go away! Honestly, you have no idea of the pressure I am under. I can't afford any distractions!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'll go.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Good. I'm attempting to subdue the elemental mechanisms of the universe to my will. Inane chatter from random idiots is not helping me achieve this!

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Please answer the question.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Stop wasting my time! That is wrong!

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Spot on!
